violations.text: The double doors to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
Per PIC, sandwich prep unit ices over, and prevents air flow. Service has been called and part has been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The floors in the walk-in cooler, walk-in freezer, kitchen, and front service area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

Various food in the prep unit was observed held between 50-54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food was moved to walk-in cooler at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Per PIC, service has been called. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The double doors to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The prep unit was observed holding an ambient temperature of 55 DF and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The floors in the walk-in cooler, walk-in freezer, kitchen, and front service area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Cheese and sausages were observed held between 46-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed items in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Inspector observed paper cups used to prop a pipe up under the back coffee area. PIC removed paper cups and installed a temporary fix that is easily cleanable. PIC stated a work order has been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The plumbing to the front handsink is in poor repair. Inspector observed a severe clog. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
